User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user profile in the messenger application.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user (e.g. from Google Auth or Sandbox).

avatar.description: URL of the user's profile picture or avatar.

online.description: Whether the user is currently online.

lastSeen.description: Epoch timestamp of the user's last activity.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single text message exchanged between two users.

id.description: Unique auto-generated ID of the message document.

senderId.description: User ID of the message sender.

recipientId.description: User ID of the message recipient.

text.description: The textual body of the message.

timestamp.description: Epoch timestamp of when the message was sent.

status.description: The delivery status of the message.

type.description: The format type of the message.

TypingState.title: TypingState
TypingState.description: Typing presence indicator for a user directed at a specific recipient.

recipientId.description: User ID of the user being typed to.

isTyping.description: Whether the sender is actively typing.

timestamp.description: Epoch timestamp when the status was last updated.

users/{userId}.description: Registered users table with presence information.
